ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alternatives" (
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternative */,
  "value" REAL /* Value associated with the alternative */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the alternative based on defined criteria */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the alternative item */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number for tracking analysis cycles */,
  "custom_id" INTEGER /* Custom identifier for user-defined tracking */,
  "alternative_of_interest" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alternative is of interest */,
  "starting_id" INTEGER /* Starting identifier for reference */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the alternative */,
  "n_alternatives" INTEGER /* Number of alternatives available for comparison */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alternative */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the alternative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alternative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the analysis */,
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alternative being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis result */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_alternative_id FOREIGN KEY ("alternative_id") REFERENCES alternatives ("alternative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alternative being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_alternative_id FOREIGN KEY ("alternative_id") REFERENCES alternatives ("alternative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alternative type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alternative type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alternative being iterated */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration */,
  "iteration_date" TEXT /* Date of the iteration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_alternative_id FOREIGN KEY ("alternative_id") REFERENCES alternatives ("alternative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "related_alternatives" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary alternative */,
  "related_alternative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alternative that is related */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., similar, complementary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_alternatives_alternative_id FOREIGN KEY ("alternative_id") REFERENCES alternatives ("alternative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_alternatives_related_alternative_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_alternative_id") REFERENCES alternatives ("alternative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_ids" (
  "custom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the custom ID */,
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alternative being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who defined the custom ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom ID */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the custom ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_ids_alternative_id FOREIGN KEY ("alternative_id") REFERENCES alternatives ("alternative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_ids_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis this result is related to */,
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alternative being analyzed */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result of the analysis */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_alternative_id FOREIGN KEY ("alternative_id") REFERENCES alternatives ("alternative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis this visualization is related to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis this report is related to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
